title: Providers
subtitle: Can configure chat models in "Chat Completion". Additionally, "Agent Runner" includes integrations with third-party services like Dify, Coze, and Alibaba Bailian(DashScope).

empty.all: No service providers available, click Add Provider to add one
empty.typed: No {type} type service providers available, click Add Provider to add one

description.openai: Supports all OpenAI API compatible providers.
description.deepseek: Official DeepSeek template for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint at https://api.deepseek.com. Best for regular chat and tool-calling flows.
description.deepseek_anthropic: Official DeepSeek template for the Anthropic-compatible endpoint at https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic. Recommended for DeepSeek V4 series.
description.kimi_code: Dedicated Kimi CodingPlan / Kimi Code integration using a custom Anthropic API compatibility layer.

availability.title: Provider Availability
availability.subtitle: Determined by testing model conversation availability, may incur API costs
availability.noData: Click "Refresh Status" button to get service provider availability

addProvider.title: Service Provider
addProvider.noTemplates: No this type provider templates available

sessionSeparation.title: Enable Provider Session Isolation
sessionSeparation.description: Different sessions can independently select text generation, TTS, STT and other service providers.

error.sessionSeparation: Failed to get session isolation configuration
error.fetchStatus: Failed to get service provider status

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete service provider {id}?

providerSources.title: Provider Sources
providerSources.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete provider source {id}? This will also delete all associated model configurations.

hints.proxy: HTTP/HTTPS proxy address, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7890. Only affects this provider's API requests, doesn't interfere with Docker internal networking.

providerSources.deepseekOpenAIActiveNote: This template uses DeepSeek's official OpenAI-compatible endpoint: https://api.deepseek.com. Use a DeepSeek API key here; you usually do not need to append /v1 or add custom headers. If you want the Anthropic-compatible protocol, switch to the DeepSeek Anthropic template.

hints.id: Unique provider source ID. Keeping deepseek is recommended unless you need multiple DeepSeek gateways side by side.
hints.key: Use your DeepSeek API key here. Multiple keys can be added for rotation or separate environments.
hints.apiBase: DeepSeek's official OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The default is https://api.deepseek.com, and AstrBot usually should not need an extra /v1 suffix.
hints.customHeaders: These key-value pairs are merged into the OpenAI SDK default_headers. Direct calls to DeepSeek usually do not need them; only add string-valued headers when your proxy, gateway, or auth chain requires them.

providerSources.deepseekAnthropicNote: If you want the Anthropic-compatible protocol, switch to the DeepSeek Anthropic template at https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic.
providerSources.deepseekAnthropicActiveNote: This template uses DeepSeek's Anthropic-compatible endpoint: https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic. Use a DeepSeek API key here; thinking is enabled by default, output_config.effort supports high / max, low / medium are compatibility-mapped to high, and budget_tokens is ignored.

hints.id: Unique provider source ID. Keeping deepseek-anthropic helps distinguish it from the standard DeepSeek OpenAI entrypoint.
hints.key: Use your DeepSeek API key here, not an Anthropic Console key.
hints.apiBase: DeepSeek's Anthropic-compatible endpoint. The default is https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic and you usually should not append an extra /v1.
hints.customHeaders: These key-value pairs are merged into the Anthropic SDK default_headers. Direct calls to DeepSeek usually do not need them; only add string-valued headers when your proxy or gateway requires them.
hints.thinkingType: Set to 'adaptive' to explicitly send the thinking toggle and unlock effort control. If left empty, DeepSeek still keeps thinking enabled by default.
hints.thinkingBudget: DeepSeek Anthropic ignores thinking.budget_tokens. This field only exists for compatibility with Anthropic-ecosystem clients and does not precisely control the budget.
hints.thinkingEffort: When Thinking Type is 'adaptive', this maps to output_config.effort. DeepSeek V4 supports high / max, while low / medium are compatibility-mapped to high.

models.empty: No configured models yet. Click "Fetch Models" above to add.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete model {id}?
